subcodes.first_line: O peoples of the world! The Hand of Divine bounty proffereth unto you the Kawthar of inner meanings. Deprive not yourselves thereof, and let not your tongue [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اهل عالم ید عطای الهی کوثر معانی عطا میفرماید خود را منع ننمائید و لسان
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @chastisement and requital, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @spiritual transformation
